CMSC799 Master's Thesis Research (1-6 Credits)

CMSC800 How to Conduct Great Research (1 Credit)

Develop research skills so as to promote high quality and high impact. Restriction: Must be in the Computer Science doctoral program. Credit Only Granted for. CMSC798F or CMSC800.

Formerly: CMSC798F.

CMSC801 Department Internal Research Seminar (1 Credit)

Research overviews from faculty to help introduce departmental research to graduate students.

Credit Only Granted for. CMSC798E or CMSC801.
